structure.text:
Subject: New Product Development Team - Carter Hoffman & Alana Krause
From: Mark Papay <mark.papay@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-05-12 17:04:37-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

I am excited to announce staffing changes to NOVA’s Product Development department effective today, 05/12/2025.  The Product team supports NOVA’s outstanding production team by exploring new product offerings in the mortgage market, assisting with loan level questions, and coordinating with banked investors when the need arises.  Meet your new team: Carter Hoffman, Product Development Manager, and Alana Krause, Sr. Product Development Analyst.  Many of you have worked with both Carter and Alana previously, they have proven to be outstanding team members willing to go above and beyond to meet the business’ needs.  With this change, new product launches will be a priority issue to address.  Evaluating new investors/products and setting expectations for new launches will be refined and improved.  Additionally, Capital Markets is taking this opportunity to hear from you.  Look for a survey in the coming days from the new product team.  Your feedback will help to shape and refine this critical department, assisting Carter and Alana in taking the Product Development Team to the next level.  Continue to email your questions to productdept@novahomeloans.com <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com> , the new team is actively working on items as we speak.

 

I have no doubt Carter and Alana can improve on our performance in the Product Development area for NOVA’s support network, and I’m looking forward to this new chapter.

 

Mark Papay

SVP Capital Markets 

NOVA Home Loans

Direct: 520.425.8503

Fax: 520.300.9810

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
